pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 13: WS_PATH=/default-domain/workspaces/Incoming-Scans; verified against verifier.py and export_result.sh which reference the same path

setup_task.sh lines 38, 52 create misclassified documents with dc:nature='invoice'; verifier.py lines 59, 79 expect nature=='contract' after correction; task description states to change nature to 'Contract'
setup_task.sh line 66 creates Office-Supplies-Invoice-9921 with dc:nature='invoice'; verifier.py line 98 expects this document to retain nature=='invoice'

setup_task.sh lines 34, 48 create these two documents with misclassified nature='invoice'; verifier.py lines 54, 74 specifically check these documents; task description lists 'Vendor Contract' and 'Service Level Agreement' as documents to fix

setup_task.sh line 62 creates document named 'Office-Supplies-Invoice-9921'; verifier.py line 93 retrieves this document as control; task description states 'Do NOT change the Office Supplies Invoice #9921'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Nuxeo Platform, a real enterprise document management system. All data is synthetic, created programmatically during task setup. The workspace '/default-domain/workspaces/Incoming-Scans' contains four documents: two misclassified documents with incorrect metadata (Vendor-Contract-Alpha and Service-Level-Agreement-2023, initially tagged as 'invoice' but should be 'contract'), one correctly classified control document (Office-Supplies-Invoice-9921, correctly tagged as 'invoice' and must not be changed), and one reference document (Consulting-Agreement, correctly tagged as 'contract'). The task requires changing the 'nature' metadata field of the two misclassified documents from 'invoice' to 'contract' while preserving the control document unchanged.
